name: frConfiguration
title: frConfiguration
description: Can be used to create a FlexRay parameter object. The data content of this object is all protocol parameters relevant to FlexRay in the context of initializing a FlexRay Communication Controller. The object data can be manipulated or read out by selectors associated with this object.
Initially, all protocol parameters are set to a value of 0.
The frGetConfiguration or frSetConfiguration functions are used to read or set parameters from or in the FlexRay interface’s Communication Controller.

parameters.name: <configuration var>
parameters.description: Character string defining the object’s variable name.
